## Highlights

- **Cardinal subagents dispatch again on the standard tier** — Claude Code's lazy frontmatter parser was consuming the inline `# D31 — …` comment as part of the model ID. Sonnet-tier dispatches (`ai-engineer`, `backend-engineer`, `devops-engineer`, `frontend-engineer`, `qa-engineer`) now resolve to a bare `claude-sonnet-4-6`. No per-call `model:` override needed.
- **Adopters with model-tier overrides set in `local/framework.config.yaml`** — same fix applied to the installer rewrite path, so re-running install / `/ginee-update` no longer reintroduces the inline-comment shape.

## Adopter migration

Re-run `/ginee-update` (or the bootstrap one-liner if `/ginee-update` is broken on your version — see [v0.12.0 notes](https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/blob/main/.github/release-notes/v0.12.0.md#adopter-migration)). No `local/*` change required.

Full fix: [#82](https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/issues/82).

**Full Changelog:** https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/compare/v0.12.0...v0.12.1
